'''鈭歨-m-dh''' ('''kahamadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whetten|whetten]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whetten|whetten]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-m-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kahamadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihamadh|thihamadh]] || [[word:jihamadh|jihamadh]] || [[word:shihamadh|shihamadh]] || [[word:kihamadh|kihamadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhamadh|thuthuhamadh]] || [[word:jujuhamadh|jujuhamadh]] || [[word:shushuhamadh|shushuhamadh]] || [[word:kukuhamadh|kukuhamadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhamadh|thuhamadh]] || [[word:juhamadh|juhamadh]] || [[word:shuhamadh|shuhamadh]] || [[word:kuhamadh|kuhamadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhamadh|thuhamadh]] || [[word:juhamadh|juhamadh]] || [[word:shuhamadh|shuhamadh]] || [[word:kuhamadh|kuhamadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehamadh|thehamadh]] || [[word:jehamadh|jehamadh]] || [[word:shehamadh|shehamadh]] || [[word:kehamadh|kehamadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohamadh|thothohamadh]] || [[word:jojohamadh|jojohamadh]] || [[word:shoshohamadh|shoshohamadh]] || [[word:kokohamadh|kokohamadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohamadh|thohamadh]] || [[word:johamadh|johamadh]] || [[word:shohamadh|shohamadh]] || [[word:kohamadh|kohamadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohamadh|thohamadh]] || [[word:johamadh|johamadh]] || [[word:shohamadh|shohamadh]] || [[word:kohamadh|kohamadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙hamadh|th忙hamadh]] || [[word:j忙hamadh|j忙hamadh]] || [[word:sh忙hamadh|sh忙hamadh]] || [[word:k忙hamadh|k忙hamadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahamadh|thathahamadh]] || [[word:jajahamadh|jajahamadh]] || [[word:shashahamadh|shashahamadh]] || [[word:kakahamadh|kakahamadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahamadh|thahamadh]] || [[word:jahamadh|jahamadh]] || [[word:shahamadh|shahamadh]] || [[word:kahamadh|kahamadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahamadh|thahamadh]] || [[word:jahamadh|jahamadh]] || [[word:shahamadh|shahamadh]] || [[word:kahamadh|kahamadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahamadh|shahamadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahamadh|goshahamadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahamadh|gokishahamadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahamadhn眉|shahamadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkn眉|goshahamadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamadhn眉|gokishahamadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahamadhsh毛|shahamadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahamadhnksh毛|goshahamadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahamadhsh毛|gokishahamadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamadhro|shahamadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkro|goshahamadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamadhro|gokishahamadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamadhmu|shahamadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkmu|goshahamadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamadhmu|gokishahamadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahamadhsher|shahamadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahamadhnksher|goshahamadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahamadhsher|gokishahamadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahamadhng|shahamadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkng|goshahamadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahamadhng|gokishahamadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahamadhya|shahamadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkya|goshahamadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahamadhya|gokishahamadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahamadhyam|shahamadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkyam|goshahamadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahamadhyam|gokishahamadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamadhn眉sh毛|shahamadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkn眉sh毛|goshahamadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamadhn眉sh毛|gokishahamadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamadhn眉ro|shahamadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkn眉ro|goshahamadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamadhn眉ro|gokishahamadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamadhn眉mu|shahamadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkn眉mu|goshahamadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamadhn眉mu|gokishahamadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamadhsh毛n眉|shahamadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamadhnksh毛n眉|goshahamadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamadhsh毛n眉|gokishahamadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamadhsh毛ro|shahamadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamadhnksh毛ro|goshahamadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamadhsh毛ro|gokishahamadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamadhsh毛mu|shahamadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamadhnksh毛mu|goshahamadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamadhsh毛mu|gokishahamadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamadhron眉|shahamadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkron眉|goshahamadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamadhron眉|gokishahamadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamadhrosh毛|shahamadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkrosh毛|goshahamadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamadhrosh毛|gokishahamadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamadhromu|shahamadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkromu|goshahamadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamadhromu|gokishahamadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamadhmun眉|shahamadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkmun眉|goshahamadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamadhmun眉|gokishahamadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamadhmush毛|shahamadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkmush毛|goshahamadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamadhmush毛|gokishahamadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamadhmuro|shahamadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamadhnkmuro|goshahamadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamadhmuro|gokishahamadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
